detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 聖經文學 (Bible Literature)	開課班級 : 應英一年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 蘇淑品,羅主恩	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
Objectives: The main purpose of this course is to help you learn how to use important Bible wisdom and principles in your life so you can benefit from taking this course. Also, it will help you find your way around in the Bible 1. demonstrate a basic understanding of the literary study of the Bible, including some Biblical themes such as exile, healing, poverty, grace, fall from grace etc. that that one might find in poetry, novels or other genres, as well as an introduction to literary analysis. We will also explore its literary genres, forms, and motifs, many of which are important to English and American literature--for example, origin stories, hero stories, psalms, parables, the loss of Eden, the Promised Land. 2. read a biblical passage with a basic understanding of what it says and of the challenges associated with applying it to our own contemporary situations 3. appreciate the importance of the Bible to various communities of faith, individuals, and cultures 4. present your own insights about the Bible intelligently in an academic environment. 


2.教學綱要
Activities: Class, group, paired discussions, topic research, journals, etc. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : English Revised Version (Simplified)　　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Journal: 50% Presentation: 50% 
Attendance: 2 class absences are permitted without penalty, but all assignments are required. Make sure you contact another student for notes, assignments, or hand-outs prior to the next class. Being 10 minutes late for class is regarded as an absence. Late Assignments: All assignments are due on the dates announced. Assignments turned in after the due dates will NOT be accepted. 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：中
